scope: Launch 1 learner-owned project revision workspace; local source, UI, and disposable PostgreSQL evidence only

claims.ownerBound: Create, paginated list, and detail read pass the authenticated learner id into SQL predicates that join through the owned project; foreign targets are indistinguishable not-found responses.
claims.appendOnly: Migration 0022 creates project_revision/project_revision_object and database update guards. Integration tests prove revision and snapshot rewrites fail with SQLSTATE 55000 while account/project deletion and object-reference nulling remain possible.
claims.idempotentConcurrentCreate: A per-project row lock serializes sequence allocation. Expected latest sequence rejects stale writers, exact request/hash retries replay once, and changed request-id reuse is rejected.
claims.safeFileAssociation: At most 20 unique files must be owned, undeleted, user_upload, and scanStatus=safe. Only metadata plus a nullable reference is recorded; no bytes or quota_ledger row are added.
claims.reviewIsolation: Revision creation creates no model_call, runner_job, or project_review record and the UI states that no implicit AI, execution, or review occurs.
claims.lifecycle: Export schema 4 includes revisions and metadata snapshots without bytes. Retention policy 2026-07-12.v3 retains history until administrator deletion, whose transaction explicitly removes link/revision rows.
claims.meaningfulActivity: A new checkpoint atomically advances last_meaningful_activity_at, closes an older open inactivity episode, and appends one project_milestone to an active learning session. Exact replay does not advance or duplicate those effects.
claims.accessibleResponsiveUi: The semantic modal has labelled controls/fieldset, status and alert regions, Escape/close handling, safe-file selection, history and unavailable-file states, pagination, and a single-column mobile layout.

verification.command: npm.cmd exec -- vitest run <12 project/lifecycle/security focused files>

verification.result: All migrations through 0024 applied successfully and the second migration pass was a no-op; all 4 project cases passed, including active-session milestone, immediate inactivity close, meaningful timestamp advancement, and exact-replay non-duplication.
passed after final project service changes

verification.command: npm.cmd exec -- eslint <17 project/lifecycle/security changed TypeScript files>

verification.result: repository-wide ESLint passed after concurrent work settled
passed; no recognized plaintext credential canaries found
1 file passed; 3 endpoint-wide denial tests passed
93 route files; 113 operations; 26 identifier contracts; 7 supporting ownership contracts; 0 errors
No schema changes after generated migration 0022
Next.js production build passed; 72 pages; both project revision routes emitted
No U+00C2, U+00E2, or U+00C3 mojibake lead characters in src or docs

notProven: Live production NUC/PostgreSQL deployment, physical-device accessibility, and Cloudflare/browser session testing are outside this local evidence.
Private GitHub App installation/token lifecycle and live GitHub API/repository outage/rate-limit/force-push drills are not implemented.
Revision metadata is not automatically reconciled to commits, branches, pull requests, or releases.
Project-review appeal overturns still require manual administrator handling and do not automatically run a corrected repository analysis.
